name: Vibe Playlists
author: Craig Lusher
description: Scheduled AI 'Vibe of the Day' playlists. Generates playlists from natural-language vibe prompts by calling the Vibe Playlists companion app, which translates each prompt into audio-feature ranges and builds the playlist from your library's essentia analysis.

app_url.title: Companion App URL
app_url.description: Base URL of the Vibe Playlists companion app (e.g. http://vibe:4546)

api_token.title: App API Token
api_token.description: Bearer token if the companion app sets VIBE_API_TOKEN (leave blank if unset)

vibe_prompts.title: Vibe Prompts (one per line)
vibe_prompts.description: Each line becomes a refreshed playlist, e.g. 'Lazy Sunday morning with coffee'
vibe_prompts.default:
Lazy Sunday morning with coffee
Rainy evening reading a book
Friday night pre-drinks energy
Deep focus work session

refresh_schedule.title: Refresh Schedule (cron)
refresh_schedule.description: When to regenerate the vibe playlists

tracks_per_playlist.title: Tracks per Playlist
tracks_per_playlist.description: Number of tracks per vibe playlist

http.reason: Call the Vibe Playlists companion app to generate playlists

config.reason: Read the companion app URL, prompts and schedule
